# 1ai-Skills
# 1319 Open-Source AI Agent Skills with Self-Evolving Meta-Skills
# https://github.com/oyi77/1ai-skills

## What This Is
1ai-Skills is the largest open-source AI agent skill library. 1319 production-ready skills across 19 categories that enable AI agents to auto-evolve, auto-learn, and auto-improve. Each skill is a self-contained `SKILL.md` with YAML frontmatter (name, description, domain, tags, optional persona) that agents load on demand.

## Installation
```bash
npx skills add oyi77/1ai-skills
# or
git clone https://github.com/oyi77/1ai-skills.git
```

## Agent Discovery Order
1. Read `SKILLS.json` for machine-readable totals per category.
2. Read `AGENTS.md` for category descriptions.
3. For `cybersecurity/` (785 skills), read `cybersecurity/AGENTS.md` for the subdomain map BEFORE loading individual skills.
5. Run `python3 scripts/lint-skills.py` for quality checks before committing.
4. Load only the specific `<category>/<skill-name>/SKILL.md` you need.

Do NOT walk all 1319 skill dirs. Grep `SKILLS.json` first.

## Categories (1319 skills total, 19 categories)

| Category | Skills | Focus |
|---|---:|---|
| cybersecurity/ | 786 | 26 subdomains: threat hunting, forensics, pen testing, red teaming, cloud security, SOC ops, malware analysis, incident response, API security, zero trust, DevSecOps, compliance, OT/ICS, IAM, agent security |
| development/ | 86 | TDD, systematic debugging, code review, PRD, dependency scanning, git worktrees, Kafka patterns, database ORMs, mobile dev, testing |
| content/ | 57 | Remotion video engine, TTS with voice cloning, semantic video matching, video generation, AI podcast, faceless YouTube, humanizer, Seedance |
| mindset/ | 55 | Negotiation, persuasion, storytelling, presentation, leadership, emotional intelligence, critical thinking, decision frameworks, productivity, public speaking |
| marketing/ | 45 | Marketing Ops OS, SEO optimizer, viral marketing, growth engine, Twitter automation, email marketing, affiliate management, ecommerce |
| core/ | 42 | Self-improvement, memory systems, AI orchestration, agent harness optimization, agent security scanner, continuous learning |
| devops/ | 33 | Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, ArgoCD, GitLab CI, cloud operations, service mesh, GitOps, free cloud infrastructure |
| integrations/ | 32 | Slack, Discord, Notion, GitHub — bots, webhooks, APIs, free SaaS toolkit, team collaboration, MCP servers |
| automation/ | 28 | n8n workflows, WhatsApp/Telegram/Twitter bots, job hunter, scrapers, content publisher, Airflow pipelines, data pipelines |
| research/ | 23 | McKinsey-style analysis, deep research, social intelligence, Polymarket, Sherlock deduction, competitive intelligence, market research |
| trading/ | 20 | Black Edge, AlphaEar, Polymarket, Tushare, crypto trading bot, DeFi protocols, smart contracts, NFTs, commodities |
| operations/ | 19 | Finance ops, revenue team, project management, payment invoicing, governance, KYC, statement audit, GL reconciliation, team ops |
| financial/ | 15 | All-in-One Finance (16 modules), Wolf Finance (22 modules), model builder, earnings viewer, pitch deck, commodities, DeFi |
| agents/ | 15 | Research, review, planning, code, deploy, refactor, subagent orchestration, security, autonomous trading agents |
| meta/ | 13 | find-skills, create-skills, auto-evolve, skill evolution engine, auto-learner, skill datastore, continuous improvement |
| sales/ | 13 | High-ticket closing, lead generation, business development, CRM automation, sales enablement, outreach automation |
| mcp/ | 14 | MCP servers: GitHub, Linear, Notion, Resend, Slack, Stripe, Supabase, codebase-memory (code intelligence), agent-reach (social scraping) |
| data/ | 10 | Data cleaning, anomaly detection, report generation, visualization, data pipelines, DBT, lakeFS, data versioning, analytics |
| productivity/ | 10 | Google Workspace, calendar, email automation, Notion, daily planner, task management, meeting automation |
**Total: 1319 skills**
## Self-Evolving System (meta/)
13 meta-skills form a self-improving agent operating system:
- auto-evolve: continuous improvement loop
- find-skills: discover community skills when local skills don't cover need
- create-skills: generate new skills when nothing exists
- skill-performance-monitor: track effectiveness in real time
- continuous-learning: confidence-weighted learning from sessions
- self-improving-agent, runtime-self-improvement: agent self-optimization
- meta-orchestrator: coordinates the loop
- (plus performance-monitor, feedback-collector, self-assessment, improvement-generator, skill-evolution, auto-learner)

## Tooling Dirs (not skill homes)
- docs/ — Setup guides (claude, cursor, opencode)
- hooks/ — Git hooks, session-start scripts, auto-evolve hooks
- manifests/ — Submission manifests for Claude App Store, OpenAI GPT Store, LangChain, HF
- references/ — Static checklists (code review, SEO, marketing, trading)
- scripts/ — Audit, install, submission, CLI utilities. Run `bash scripts/audit-skills.sh` to refresh counts.

## Skill Anatomy
```yaml
---
name: skill-name
description: Triggers and use cases.
domain: cybersecurity         # optional
subdomain: malware-analysis   # optional
tags: [tag1, tag2]            # optional
persona:                       # optional
  name: "Expert Name"
  expertise: ["Area1", "Area2"]
---
<markdown body with workflow, examples, references>
```

## Maintenance
- Add a skill: create `<category>/<skill-name>/SKILL.md`, then run `bash scripts/audit-skills.sh --write` to refresh SKILLS.json.
- Counts in README.md, AGENTS.md, and llms.txt MUST match SKILLS.json. Re-run audit before commit.
- All SKILL.md files must start with `---` frontmatter (validated by CI).
